title: Well-done: Secure key copy in lichen_l2_input
description: lichen_l2.c:628-632 copies link_key into a local buffer before use rather than capturing a pointer to link_ctx.link_key. The comment explains this is defensive against future refactors that might change cleanup timing. This is a 16-byte copy (cheap) that eliminates a subtle lifetime dependency. If someone suggests 'simplifying' by using the pointer directly, push back - the current code is more robust against maintenance errors.
